steps.title: Input your sale details and products

items.question: What is the Black Friday Poster workflow?
items.answer: Black Friday Poster is an AI-powered workflow that creates eye-catching Black Friday sale posters instantly. Generate professional promotional graphics that drive conversions during the biggest shopping event of the year.

items.question: Who is Black Friday Poster designed for?
items.answer: Black Friday Poster is essential for e-commerce and retail marketers: e-commerce store owners, retail marketing teams, social media managers, and email marketers who need professional Black Friday graphics.

items.question: What kind of input do I need to start?
items.answer: You provide your sale details and products, including discount percentages, featured products, brand colors, key promotional messages, and any urgency elements like limited time offers or stock constraints.

items.question: What type of output can I expect from this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow generates multiple poster variations with compelling layouts, typography, and visual hierarchy designed to grab attention and drive clicks during the Black Friday shopping season.

items.question: Can I create posters in different sizes and formats?
items.answer: Yes. You can select from bold, minimalist, luxury, or energetic design styles optimized for your brand and audience, with dimensions tailored for social media, email, website banners, and digital advertising.

items.question: How do credits and pricing work for Black Friday Poster?
items.answer: Each poster generation consumes credits based on the image model and complexity. Black Friday posters are optimized for high conversion impact while keeping costs reasonable for your busiest shopping season.

items.question: Can I maintain brand consistency across all Black Friday materials?
items.answer: Absolutely. The workflow incorporates your brand colors, fonts, and visual identity to ensure all Black Friday promotional materials maintain consistent branding across all customer touchpoints.

items.question: Is this suitable for last-minute Black Friday campaigns?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow is designed for speed, allowing you to create professional Black Friday graphics in minutes rather than days, perfect for both planned campaigns and last-minute promotional opportunities.
